author: Mnih et al. (2013)
title: Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: Awal deep RL: Q-network main Atari langsung dari piksel. Wajib baca pertama.

author: Mnih et al. (2015)
title: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning
why: Nature DQN: target network + replay bikin stabil, level manusia di 49 game.

author: van Hasselt et al. (2016)
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Double Q-learning
why: DQN overestimate nilai; Double DQN benerin pakai dua estimator. Simpel banget.

author: Wang et al. (2016)
title: Dueling Network Architectures for Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: Pisah value sama advantage di arsitektur; belajar state penting tanpa tiap aksi.

author: Schaul et al. (2015)
title: Prioritized Experience Replay
why: Replay transisi yang kejutannya gede lebih sering. Belajar jadi jauh lebih cepat.

author: Hausknecht & Stone (2015)
title: Deep Recurrent Q-Learning for Partially Observable MDPs
why: Tambah LSTM ke DQN buat observasi parsial. Jembatan ke memori di RL.

author: Osband et al. (2016)
title: Deep Exploration via Bootstrapped DQN
why: Eksplorasi lewat ensemble Q-head, bukan epsilon acak. Ide deep exploration.

author: Fortunato et al. (2017)
title: Noisy Networks for Exploration
why: Noise di bobot jaringan gantiin epsilon-greedy; eksplorasi ikut kepelajar.

author: Nair et al. (2015)
title: Massively Parallel Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: Gorila: DQN didistribusi banyak aktor+learner. Awal RL skala besar.

author: Riedmiller (2005)
title: Neural Fitted Q Iteration
why: Nenek moyang DQN: batch Q pakai neural net. Konteks sejarah value-based.

author: Williams (1992)
title: Simple Statistical Gradient-Following Algorithms for Connectionist Reinforcement Learning
why: Asal REINFORCE: naik gradien reward langsung. Fondasi semua policy gradient.

author: Sutton et al. (2000)
title: Policy Gradient Methods for Reinforcement Learning with Function Approximation
why: Teorema policy gradient resmi; dasar teori semua metode actor. Wajib.

author: Konda & Tsitsiklis (2000)
title: Actor-Critic Algorithms
why: Formalisasi actor-critic: kritik nilai bimbing aktor. Fondasi advantage AC.

author: Kakade (2001)
title: A Natural Policy Gradient
why: Gradien natural pakai geometri Fisher; cikal bakal TRPO/PPO nanti.

author: Mnih et al. (2016)
title: Asynchronous Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: A3C/A2C: banyak aktor paralel ganti replay. Batu penjuru actor-critic modern.

author: Schulman et al. (2015)
title: High-Dimensional Continuous Control Using Generalized Advantage Estimation
why: GAE: tukar bias-variansi advantage pakai lambda. Dipakai di mana-mana.

author: Silver et al. (2014)
title: Deterministic Policy Gradient Algorithms
why: DPG: gradien policy deterministik buat aksi kontinu. Basis teori DDPG.

author: Lillicrap et al. (2015)
title: Continuous control with deep reinforcement learning
why: DDPG: DPG + trik DQN buat kontrol kontinu deep. Actor-critic off-policy.

author: Gu et al. (2016)
title: Continuous Deep Q-Learning with Model-based Acceleration
why: NAF: Q-learning kontinu tanpa actor terpisah pakai advantage normal.

author: Wang et al. (2017)
title: Sample Efficient Actor-Critic with Experience Replay
why: ACER: actor-critic off-policy pakai importance sampling terpotong + trust region.

author: Bellemare et al. (2017)
title: A Distributional Perspective on Reinforcement Learning
why: C51: belajar distribusi return, bukan cuma rata-rata. Komponen Rainbow.

author: Wu et al. (2017)
title: Scalable trust-region method for deep reinforcement learning using Kronecker-factored approximation
why: ACKTR: natural gradient praktis pakai K-FAC. Gabung teori Kakade + AC.

author: Dabney et al. (2017)
title: Distributional Reinforcement Learning with Quantile Regression
why: QR-DQN: model distribusi return via kuantil. Lanjutan C51 yang lebih rapi.

author: Hessel et al. (2017)
title: Rainbow: Combining Improvements in Deep Reinforcement Learning
why: Gabung 6 upgrade DQN jadi satu. Ablation-nya bikin ngerti tiap komponen.

author: Horgan et al. (2018)
title: Distributed Prioritized Experience Replay
why: Ape-X: prioritized replay didistribusi ratusan aktor. Skala + sample-efficient.

author: Dabney et al. (2018)
title: Implicit Quantile Networks for Distributional Reinforcement Learning
why: IQN: fungsi kuantil implisit penuh; distributional paling fleksibel + risk-aware.

author: Espeholt et al. (2018)
title: IMPALA: Scalable Distributed Deep-RL with Importance Weighted Actor-Learner Architectures
why: IMPALA + V-trace: koreksi off-policy buat actor-learner throughput tinggi.
